ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot playfully picking and presenting cherries.  The movement will be light and fluid, suggesting a gentle interaction with the imagined fruit. Frame 1 shows both arms relaxed. Frame 2 has the right arm reaching forward, slightly down, and slightly inward, as if to grasp a cherry. Frame 3 shows the right arm returning with an imaginary cherry to the robot's mouth, slightly up and in. Frame 4 brings the right arm down, showing the empty hand, and the left arm raises slightly in a gesture of satisfaction.  Each movement is distinct and expressive, utilizing the robot's two-joint arm system for natural-looking motion. The left arm acts as a counterpoint, remaining mostly still to emphasize the right arm's actions.

frames.beat: both arms hang relaxed at the sides
right arm reaches down to pluck a cherry
bringing the cherry up to the mouth
left arm lifts slightly, right arm rests
